scripts.dev:desktop: concurrently -k -n server,client,electron -c blue,green,cyan "pnpm --filter @myeditor/server dev" "pnpm --filter @myeditor/client dev" "sleep 5 && pnpm --filter @myeditor/desktop dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @myeditor/shared build && pnpm --filter @myeditor/server build && pnpm --filter @myeditor/client build && pnpm --filter @myeditor/desktop build
